name: Rybbon (BHN Rewards)
description: Rybbon (now BHN Rewards) is a digital rewards management platform providing a REST API for sending gift cards and prepaid virtual cards, managing reward campaigns, tracking recipient engagement, and accessing reward analytics.

itemListElement.name: Rybbon Instant Rewards API
itemListElement.description: REST API for programmatically sending digital gift cards, virtual prepaid Visa/Mastercard, e-gift cards, and other digital rewards instantly to recipients.

itemListElement.name: Rybbon Points-to-Rewards API
itemListElement.description: REST API for integrating a points-based reward system, allowing platforms to allocate points to recipients which can then be redeemed for digital gift cards and prepaid rewards.

potentialAction.name: API Authentication
potentialAction.description: Authenticate via OAuth 2.0 client credentials at https://oauth.rybbon.net/oauth2/token
